name: ai-hub
description: AI skills — integrations with Kaiten, Time, Buildin, Genie, Holst + automation workflows (spike research, product discovery, testing, dev diagnostics)

plugins.name: spike
plugins.description: Spike research workflow — 3 specialized agents (explorer, researcher, architect) produce a structured report from a Kaiten card

plugins.name: discovery
plugins.description: Full product discovery cycle — from problem to go/no-go decision (9 phases, 12 sub-agents)

plugins.name: kaiten
plugins.description: Kaiten board automation tools — cards, columns, properties, comments

plugins.name: time
plugins.description: Time (Mattermost) integration — read/write channels, messages, threads with dual auth (bot + personal)

plugins.name: buildin
plugins.description: Buildin.ai wiki page management — create and update documentation pages

plugins.name: holst
plugins.description: Holst.so board data export — frames, stickers, texts via Chrome DevTools

plugins.name: genie
plugins.description: Genie API integration for AI-powered search and data retrieval

plugins.name: reverse-product-analysis
plugins.description: Full service functionality inventory from source code — 9 agents in 4 waves for reverse engineering

plugins.name: test-factory
plugins.description: AI test generation with Ralph-loop quality gate — coder agent writes tests, reviewer agent validates

plugins.name: development
plugins.description: Dev environment investigation — pods, logs, Kafka, services health diagnostics

plugins.name: hub-meta
plugins.description: AI Hub meta-tools — setup wizard, create new commands, run session retrospectives

plugins.name: presentations
plugins.description: HTML presentation generator — visually striking slides with auto-style discovery from design references

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Autonomous C#/.NET code review — fail-fast pipeline with mechanical checks + AI sub-agents (performance, architecture, correctness, UI/Blazor)
